ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumNous/new-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api
Language: go
A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SagerNet/sing-box
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SagerNet/sing-box
Language: go
The universal proxy platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: XTLS/Xray-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core
Language: go
Xray, Penetrates Everything. Also the best v2ray-core. Where the magic happens. An open platform for various uses.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: etcd-io/etcd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd
Language: go
Distributed reliable key-value store for the most critical data of a distributed system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gin-gonic/gin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gin-gonic/gin
Language: go
Gin is a high-performance HTTP web framework written in Go. It provides a Martini-like API but with significantly better performance—up to 40 times faster—thanks to httprouter. Gin is designed for building REST APIs, web applications, and microservices.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: goharbor/harbor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/goharbor/harbor
Language: go
An open source trusted cloud native registry project that stores, signs, and scans content.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: googleapis/mcp-toolbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/googleapis/mcp-toolbox
Language: go
MCP Toolbox for Databases is an open source MCP server for databases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: harness/harness
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/harness/harness
Language: go
Harness Open Source is an end-to-end developer platform with Source Control Management, CI/CD Pipelines, Hosted Developer Environments, and Artifact Registries.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: helm/helm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/helm/helm
Language: go
The Kubernetes Package Manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: henrygd/beszel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/henrygd/beszel
Language: go
Lightweight server monitoring with historical data, docker stats, and alerts.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jesseduffield/lazygit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit
Language: go
simple terminal UI for git commands

ns0:entry.ns0:title: maximhq/bifrost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/maximhq/bifrost
Language: go
Fastest enterprise AI gateway (50x faster than LiteLLM) with adaptive load balancer, cluster mode, guardrails, 1000+ models support & <100 µs overhead at 5k RPS.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moby/moby
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moby/moby
Language: go
The Moby Project - a collaborative project for the container ecosystem to assemble container-based systems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mostlygeek/llama-swap
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mostlygeek/llama-swap
Language: go
Reliable model swapping for any local OpenAI/Anthropic compatible server - llama.cpp, vllm, etc

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netbirdio/netbird
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/netbirdio/netbird
Language: go
Connect your devices into a secure WireGuard®-based overlay network with SSO, MFA and granular access controls.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ollama/ollama
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ollama/ollama
Language: go
Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opencloud-eu/opencloud
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opencloud-eu/opencloud
Language: go
🌤️ OpenCloud is the open source platform for file management, sharing and collaboration. Simple and sovereign.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
